Orerve

System / Location · First seen 3305-09-13 · 7 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3305-09-13 → 3305-10-31
System Overview

Orerve is a system in Elite Dangerous, significant from 3305-09-13 to 3305-10-31. Associated with Interstellar Association for Agriculture, Rockforth Corporation. Notable events include: The IAA confirms Rockforth's EX7 fertiliser is linked to the blight.; The IAA, Rockforth, Vandermeer and Neomedical develop an agronomic treatment that reverses the blight's effects.

System Data
Coordinates: [74.03125, 48.75, 64.75]
Allegiance: Federation
Government: Corporate
Controlling Faction: Terra-EX Astro Corp
Security: Medium
Economy: Agriculture
Population: 2.5B

Mentions Timeline (7 articles)
3305-10-31
Blight Pathogen Cured
The agronomic treatment proves effective against the blight pathogen. Farming communities in Diso and Orerve begin recovering. Mass production of the treatment begins for galaxy-wide distribution.
3305-10-28
Scythe of Panem Militants Defeated
Scythe of Panem militants are defeated in the Quator system. Bruthanvan Co security teams and independent pilots neutralise the group's ringleaders. An underground facility beneath Weber Settlement yields arrest evidence.
3305-10-24
Anti Blight Treatment Discovered
The IAA, Rockforth, Vandermeer and Neomedical develop an agronomic treatment that reverses the blight's effects. Traders are asked to distribute the treatment to Diso and Orerve as priority agricultural centres.
3305-10-16
Initiative to Eradicate Rockforth Fertiliser
The IAA confirms Rockforth's EX7 fertiliser is linked to the blight. An initiative launches to collect and safely dispose of the contaminated fertiliser from markets across multiple systems.
3305-10-10
Initiative to Counter Poor Harvests
Coordinated trade initiatives launch in Diso and Orerve to mitigate crop yield losses. The IAA suspects a new form of blight is responsible for rapid crop degeneration. Traders deliver pesticides, synthetic reagents and grain.
3305-10-06
Common Symptoms Among Damaged Crops
The IAA identifies common biological markers in diseased crops across multiple systems. Farmers report healthy crops withering within days. Authorities struggle to address citizen concerns amid panic buying.
3305-09-13
Agricultural Industry Predicts Low Harvest
The IAA announces below-average crop yields in key agricultural systems including Diso and Orerve. An investigation is launched to identify causes. Synthetic treatments are proposed to enhance fertility.
